title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Asian Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
